questions.statement: Who called the Preamble as the Identity Card of the Constitution?

options: The Preamble to the Indian Constitution is based on the &lsquo;Objectives Resolution&#39; drafted by BR Ambedkar /
It has been amended only once /

It stipulates November 26, 1949 as the date&nbsp;of adoption of the Constitution /

options: India has an elected head called the President /
Absence of restraints on the activities of individuals /

options: Date of adoption of the Constitution /
Date of enforcement of the Constitution /

questions.statement: The terms Liberty, Equality and Fraternity used in the Preamble of the Constitution of India are inspired from which revolution?
